title: TC-TWS-ASYM-001: Insert Right Earbud Into Case — Left Earbud Remains Connected
steps: Precondition: Both earbuds connected, media streaming (music) active.
Open Poly Studio Mobile app → Home screen. Verify both earbuds show as connected.
Insert the RIGHT earbud into the charging case.
Observe the LEFT earbud connection state on the app Home screen.
Verify media audio continues playing through the LEFT earbud only.
Remove the RIGHT earbud from the case.
Verify both earbuds reconnect and stereo audio resumes.
expected: Expected: LEFT earbud remains connected and media continues in mono. App shows LEFT connected, RIGHT disconnected. Actual (If Bug): Both earbuds disconnect, media stops entirely, app shows both disconnected.

title: TC-TWS-ASYM-002: Insert Left Earbud Into Case — Right Earbud Remains Connected (Symmetry Check)
steps: Precondition: Both earbuds connected, active phone call in progress.
Open Poly Studio Mobile app → Home screen. Verify both earbuds show as connected.
Insert the LEFT earbud into the charging case.
Observe the RIGHT earbud connection state on the app Home screen.
Verify call audio continues through the RIGHT earbud only.
Remove the LEFT earbud from the case.
Verify both earbuds reconnect and stereo call audio resumes.
expected: Expected: RIGHT earbud remains connected and call continues in mono. App shows RIGHT connected, LEFT disconnected. Actual (If Bug): Both earbuds disconnect, call drops, app shows both disconnected.

title: TC-TWS-ASYM-003: App Lifecycle — Background/Foreground With One Earbud In Case
steps: Precondition: Both earbuds connected. Set Transparency Mode → Environment Surround level to 85.
Insert the RIGHT earbud into the charging case.
Press Home button to background the app.
Wait 30 seconds.
Reopen the app (foreground).
Observe the Home screen earbud connection indicators.
Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → Transparency Mode. Verify Environment Surround level is still 85.
Switch to Speech sub-setting. Verify Free level is unchanged from last set value.
Switch back to Environment. Verify Surround level is still 85.
expected: Expected: App shows LEFT connected, RIGHT disconnected after foreground. All Transparency settings persist correctly (Surround=85, Speech unchanged). Actual (If Bug): App shows both disconnected, or settings reset to defaults after lifecycle transition.

title: TC-TWS-ASYM-004: Reverse Scenario — Remove One Earbud From Case While Other Is Already Connected
steps: Precondition: LEFT earbud already connected and streaming media. RIGHT earbud is in the charging case.
Open Poly Studio Mobile app → Home screen. Verify LEFT shows connected, RIGHT shows disconnected.
Remove the RIGHT earbud from the charging case.
Observe the app Home screen connection indicators.
Verify the RIGHT earbud connects independently.
Verify the LEFT earbud remains connected without interruption (no audio dropout).
Verify stereo audio resumes on both earbuds.
expected: Expected: RIGHT earbud connects independently. LEFT earbud remains connected throughout — no audio dropout or disconnection. App shows both connected. Actual (If Bug): LEFT earbud disconnects momentarily when RIGHT is removed, or RIGHT fails to connect independently.

title: TC-TWS-ASYM-005: Rapid Insert/Remove Cycling — One Earbud
steps: Precondition: Both earbuds connected, media streaming.
Insert the LEFT earbud into the case. Wait 2 seconds.
Remove the LEFT earbud from the case. Wait 2 seconds.
Repeat steps 2-3 rapidly 5 times in succession.
After the final removal, verify both earbuds are connected.
Verify stereo media playback resumes normally.
Open Poly Studio Mobile app → Home screen. Verify both earbuds show as connected.
expected: Expected: After cycling completes, both earbuds reconnect and stereo audio resumes. App shows both connected. Actual (If Bug): One or both earbuds fail to reconnect, app shows persistent disconnection, or audio remains in mono.

title: TC-TWS-ASYM-006: Audio Routing — Mono Fallback When One Earbud In Case
steps: Precondition: Both earbuds connected. Play stereo test track (left channel: sine tone, right channel: voice narration).
Insert the RIGHT earbud into the charging case.
Verify audio continues through the LEFT earbud only.
Verify the audio is the LEFT channel content (sine tone), not mixed or silent.
Remove the RIGHT earbud. Verify stereo audio returns (left: sine tone, right: voice).
Insert the LEFT earbud into the charging case.
Verify audio continues through the RIGHT earbud only.
Verify the audio is the RIGHT channel content (voice narration), not mixed or silent.
expected: Expected: Mono fallback correctly routes the remaining channel's audio to the single active earbud. No audio stops entirely. Actual (If Bug): Audio stops entirely when one earbud is inserted, or both channels are mixed into the remaining earbud incorrectly, or wrong channel plays.

title: TC-TWS-ASYM-007: Call Scenario — One Earbud Inserted During Active Call
steps: Precondition: Both earbuds connected, active phone call.
Insert the RIGHT earbud into the charging case.
Verify call audio continues through the LEFT earbud.
Verify the far-end caller can still hear the user clearly (microphone on LEFT earbud active).
Verify the call is not dropped or put on hold.
Remove the RIGHT earbud from the case.
Verify call audio returns to stereo on both earbuds.
End the call normally.
expected: Expected: Call continues uninterrupted in mono through the remaining earbud. Microphone remains active. Call is not dropped. Actual (If Bug): Call drops, or call is put on hold, or microphone deactivates, or both earbuds disconnect.

title: TC-TWS-ASYM-008: App Force-Kill While One Earbud In Case — State Persistence On Relaunch
steps: Precondition: Both earbuds connected. Set EQ to Bass Boost. Set ANC level to 70.
Insert the LEFT earbud into the charging case.
Immediately (within 2 seconds) force-kill the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Relaunch the app.
Observe the Home screen earbud connection indicators.
Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → EQ. Verify Bass Boost is still selected.
Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → ANC. Verify ANC level is still 70.
Remove the LEFT earbud from the case. Verify both earbuds reconnect.
expected: Expected: App relaunches showing LEFT disconnected, RIGHT connected. EQ (Bass Boost) and ANC (70) persist correctly. Actual (If Bug): App shows both disconnected, or settings reset to defaults after force-kill.

title: TC-TWS-ASYM-009: Bluetooth Disconnect/Reconnect While One Earbud In Case
steps: Precondition: Both earbuds connected. LEFT earbud inserted in case, RIGHT earbud in ear and streaming.
From phone Bluetooth settings, disconnect the device.
Wait 10 seconds.
Reconnect the device from phone Bluetooth settings.
Open Poly Studio Mobile app → Home screen.
Verify the RIGHT earbud reconnects.
Verify the LEFT earbud remains disconnected (still in case).
Remove the LEFT earbud from the case. Verify it connects independently.
expected: Expected: After Bluetooth reconnect, only the RIGHT earbud (out of case) reconnects. LEFT earbud remains disconnected until removed from case. Actual (If Bug): Both earbuds reconnect even though LEFT is still in case, or LEFT fails to connect when later removed.

title: TC-TWS-ASYM-010: Phone Reboot With One Earbud In Case
steps: Precondition: Both earbuds connected. RIGHT earbud inserted in case, LEFT earbud in ear.
Reboot the phone.
After phone restarts, wait for automatic Bluetooth reconnection.
Open Poly Studio Mobile app → Home screen.
Verify the LEFT earbud (out of case) reconnects automatically.
Verify the RIGHT earbud (in case) shows as disconnected.
Remove the RIGHT earbud from the case. Verify it connects independently.
Verify stereo audio playback on both earbuds.
expected: Expected: After phone reboot, only the LEFT earbud (out of case) auto-reconnects. RIGHT earbud remains disconnected until removed from case. Actual (If Bug): Both earbuds fail to reconnect, or RIGHT earbud attempts connection while in case (wasting battery), or LEFT fails to auto-reconnect.
